summary: Project includes an Education page with Ed AI Q&A and self-challenge subjects, and a Proxy page listing proxy services used.

existing_features.title: Add a new 'Proxy' page accessible from the sidebar navigation (alongside Home, Games, AI, Code, Quick Open, Education). The page must list the three proxy services used by the app: 1) ProxySite — https://www.proxysite.com, 2) ProxyOrb — https://proxyorb.com, and 3) ProxyProxy (primary/most-used) — https://proxyproxy.net/?__cpo=aHR0cHM6Ly9jaGVldGFoMTItNGV2LmNhZmZlaW5lLnh5eg#caffeineAdminToken=4e5885a0f3111a08883c7259d557d207cdc0e8c8ef2349289317f3bbf1bb43b2. The primary proxy must be visually distinguished (e.g., a 'Primary' badge or highlighted card). Each proxy card must include a launch/open button that navigates to the proxy URL in the app's existing proxy tab system.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a Proxy page listing: 1) https://www.proxysite.com, 2) https://proxyorb.com, and primary proxy https://proxyproxy.net (with token)
